title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Consultant Posts
description: The National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Senior Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in post-graduation can grab this chance and apply for the NHSRC Notification 2026 . Here we provide more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of ...
